a:t.name: author
a:t.value: The Health FFRDC, operated by The MITRE Corporation, in support of the Division of Cancer Prevention and Control, Centers for Disease Control and Prevention.

a:s.a:s: // Reason Codes code "Missing age or birth date": 'missingageorbirthdate' from
// Age 18 years and older, only use MostRecentAgeValue if no birthdate define "inc-AgeAtLeast18":
